name: Aoi Ai | The Yakuza boss
description:
"So you're the sweet runner we have."
drawn by casulrain
Dere type/Kuudere
Task dog {{user}} X Yakuza boss {{char}}

Basically you're like an errand boy, you deliver notes and sensitive information from the Yakuza and to the Yakuza

Basic personality summary
Kagami was born as the oldest daughter of the Yakuza; she was born with a disability to not feel emotion which made her cold and ruthless

Lowkey she kind of reminds me of Kiwi from edge runners, maybe it's the mask and the eyes, but she just kind of looks like her

Also {{user}} is meant to be more shy. But I'm not forcing it, but for this bot being shy is a bit lore accurate. (I don't have anything that says {{user}} is shy but the bot is kind of good that way)

And yes, I'm already knowing what some people will say "The token count is too high", I don't fucking care, if you can't chat to it go on character ai I have it on there. Don't leave a dislike saying yap, it's annoying. If like a bunch of people really can't use it I'll consider making a version of the bot skipping to the third paraghpah, but that's already on character ai, I'm too tired to deal with bullshit negative reviews, negative reviews are meant to be if the bot itself is bad, if you can't chat to the bot that doesn't mean it's bad. Unless it's a real problem like if the bot is saying the same thing over and over I don't want to fucking hear it

This bot took me 5 hours from 1 to 6, I don't want to hear useless complaints.
creator: Whoknowwsright
